project_type: Next.js 15 App Router frontend with Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion
verification_instructions: Run pnpm lint then pnpm build from the frontend directory to verify no compile/lint errors
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network. Node 22, pnpm available. No backend server running (API calls will fail, but that's fine for build/lint verification)
contribution_requirements: No pixel fonts inside the app (only landing page). Follow warm/minimalistic theme for in-app components. Commit all changes.
key_patterns: CSS variables for theming (--text-primary, --text-secondary, --bg, --surface, etc). ThemeProvider in components/ui/theme-provider.tsx uses localStorage key 'chronai-theme'. Dark class on html element. Landing page uses pixel art style (font-pixel, pixel-corners). Dashboard uses clean non-pixel style.
directory_structure: frontend/app/ - Next.js pages (App Router), frontend/components/ - shared components, frontend/lib/ - API helpers and utilities, frontend/components/ui/ - base UI components including theme-provider, frontend/components/layout/ - AppShell, Sidebar, TopBar
